title: Word Transformer
description: Given two words of equal length that are in a dictionary, write a method to transform one word into another word by changing only one letter at a time.

content.text: Given two words of equal length that are in a dictionary, write a method to transform one word into another word by changing only one letter at a time.

Given two words of equal length that are in a dictionary, write a method to transform one word into another word by changing only one letter at a time. The new word you get in each step must be in the dictionary. Return each step in the transformation. Return null (or empty) if there is no such transformation.
See problem output in legacy docs.
